untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit IV (implied volatility) values, delta-weighted spread construction logic, and option-specific parameters (delta ranges, bid-ask spreads on option legs) which are not available in the provided indicator set. The engine supports spot price indicators and volatility proxies (hvol_20, india_vix) but lacks: (1) direct IV data, (2) delta calculations, (3) options chain data, (4) spread-leg pairing logic. A full implementation requires options market data and IV surface modeling outside this backtester's scope.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy mapping: hvol_20 as realized volatility forecast component, india_vix as market IV proxy, bb_pct_b for relative valuation positioning. However, this loses the core signal intent: delta-weighted spread construction requires actual option deltas and IV term structure, neither of which can be derived from spot price indicators alone. Recommend: (1) upgrade data source to include options chains, or (2) reclassify as non-backtestable derivative strategy.
